sizing_rule.note: Maintain constant contract count during normal trading. Only reduce contracts during equity declines, stepping down one contract level at a time, with absolute floor of 1 contract minimum. Cannot advance contract count unless committed to holding 1-contract minimum through future drawdowns.

source_rule_text: Trade on a constant-contract basis and do not trim back below 1 contract on equity declines; only advance contracts if willing to maintain this minimum floor.
